message:
provider: add FromStr impl for KnownProvider

Implement std::str::FromStr for KnownProvider enum to enable:
- Parsing provider identifiers from config files and CLI arguments
- Round-trip serialization/deserialization
- Case-sensitive matching for all known providers

Supported providers:
- anthropic, openai, google, google-vertex, amazon-bedrock
- azure-openai, github-copilot, xai, groq, cerebras
- openrouter, mistral

Custom providers are supported via fallback: any non-empty string that
doesn't match a known provider becomes KnownProvider::Custom(string).
Empty strings return an error.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.5 <noreply@anthropic.com>
